title: More than one column with total sum
excerpt: I want know how to have a total sum in a column. The board already has one of the total amount of different grants, but I want also to see the total sum of amount disbursed.

posts.author: GabrielaRangel (Gabriela)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want know how to have a total sum in a column. The board already has one of the total amount of different grants, but I want also to see the total sum of amount disbursed.

image234×484 18.6 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like you’re Amount Disbursed is a mirror/connected column. That column type doesn’t have a summary cell .
